positive: Minimalist abstract watercolor forest scene, featuring stylized interlocking woodland creatures like foxes, deer, and owls in soft, dappled silhouettes. The composition should be circular and centralized, framed by delicate vine work and abstract foliage elements. Style: Watercolor and linework fusion, incorporating muted earthy tones (sage green, terracotta, dusty blue) with crisp white highlights. Focus on clean negative space and strong tonal contrast against a light background. Ideal for repeating pattern print on apparel, emphasizing elegant silhouette cutouts and natural flow. Studio lighting, high detail, vector art quality.
